## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Evidence and validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v` passes
- [ ] `python scripts/check_public_release.py` passes
- [ ] Documentation is updated in both English and Persian when behavior changes
- [ ] No real audit evidence, credentials, private paths, or third-party media are included
- [ ] I have signed off my commits under the project DCO

## Methodology impact

Explain any effect on inclusion, claim extraction, market evidence, scoring, hashes, or publication semantics. Write “none” if there is no effect.
